title: Maxi Spray Floral Foam Tray Val Spicer Range - 21cm x 13cm x 9cm - Swag Pew End
features: The Medi Spray Tray is the middle size of all our Spray Trays and popular for most uses
With a plastic back, plastic caging and sturdy handle, the Spray Tray can be used for a variety of arrangements including church pew displays, hanging displays & funeral arrangements

Wet foam is traditionally used with fresh cut or living flowers as it requires moisture to help the flower live for longer. Wet Foam should be immersed in water prior to use in order to gain the required moisture
